text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I just remembered—Oguri was all<n>pumped
for some eatin' contest that's<n>comin' up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That sounds like a blast! I'm not one<n>to miss a
festival. Maybe I should join.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... I might lose to Oguri, but there's<n>no way
I'm losin' to someone my own<n>size!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That does it! Count me in! Prepare tolose big time!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, doesn't that sound fun. I wish the<n>best of
luck to both of you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Creek, it's now or never.<n>Don'tcha
wanna show off your stuff too?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's fine. I'll be at the infirmary,<n>ready to
take care of you two when you<n>collapse. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo and Inari
text_block_list.text:
Da heck! You think we can't handle it?!
Za heck! You think we can't handle it?!
